system.notes: A bumper winch for pulling/towing/lifting, with its own Load Rating up to the Winch Capacity Table max by Body: B0 5 kg, B1 25, B2 200, B3 750, B4 2,000, B5 5,000, B6 20,000, B7 30,000, B8 45,000, B9 60,000, B10+ Body²×750. Parts cost = Load Rating × 75¥; load −(Body × 2.5) kg; Avail 6/14 days; Street Index 1.5; Base Time 1 day. Rigger 2 p.146.
